title: JJPRIME - Magnetic Travel Board Games Set of 4 Chess, Draughts, Ludo, Snakes and Ladders Game for Kids Travel Games For Kids On Plane | Magnetic Games For Kid Travel Chess Set Magnetic with Pouch
features: AIRPLANE GAMES FOR KIDS TRAVEL - These magnetic board games set are made of durable plastic with Fine texture, gives you smooth hand-feel while lightweight and portable; well-crafted chess pieces make it much more deluxe.

LIGHT MAGNETISM - Every individual pieces of this travel board games for adults have a light magnetic attraction to the 64-square playing field; light magnetism would make it stable to play while not hard to move the piece.

TRAVEL & POCKET GAMES - These mini board games are portable and perfectly sized to travel with, but also large enough to play comfortably. Children can also plat at home to relieve the stress, cultivate logical thinking, and make life full of fun!

SET OF 4 TRAVEL GAME - A set of four individually boxed magnetic travel games for kids comes with a carry pouch; Chess, Ludo, Snake and Ladder and Draughts. It can be played by both adults and children and it is very easy to learn.

WIDE APPLICATIONS - The magnetic game set with Foldable design is suitable for home, company, school, journey, bus or picnic. Our game sets create a lot of fun and help kids to show their creativity. It creates the strong relationship among children and parents.
